task_completion.description: Open the SolveSpace application with the initial flange drawing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace GUI is visible on the screen, displaying a 2D sketch of a T-flange.

task_completion.description: Update the base width and base height constraints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace sketch shows a horizontal distance constraint of 120 (or 120.0) for the bottom base width, and a vertical distance constraint of 12 (or 12.0) for the base thickness/height.

task_completion.description: Update the hub width and hub height constraints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace sketch shows a horizontal distance constraint of 36 (or 36.0) for the top hub width, and a vertical distance constraint of 60 (or 60.0) for the hub height.
The SolveSpace sketch shows a horizontal distance constraint of 42 (or 42.0) defining the offset between the left edge of the base and the left edge of the hub.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected drawing as flange_corrected.slvs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title shows 'flange_corrected.slvs', a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving this filename, or a file manager/terminal shows 'flange_corrected.slvs' in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.
An 'Export' dialog is visible saving 'flange_corrected.dxf', or a file manager/terminal shows the newly created 'flange_corrected.dxf' file in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SolveSpace GUI to modify the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the SolveSpace graphical interface to change constraints, rather than using a text editor or terminal commands to modify the .slvs file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the DXF file was exported using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using SolveSpace's export menu (e.g., File -> Export 2d View) rather than manually creating a file or renaming an extension in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a python script or terminal shortcut to bypass the GUI task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent running a script to generate the .slvs or .dxf files automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct dimensions to look for in the SolveSpace sketch are: Base width: 120.0 mm, Base height: 12.0 mm, Hub width: 36.0 mm, Hub height: 60.0 mm, Left offset: 42.0 mm. The corrected file must be saved as 'flange_corrected.slvs' and exported as 'flange_corrected.dxf' in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.
